default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

Discuss HeyGen's content strategy, including webinars, blog posts, and programmatic SEO efforts.

## Key Takeaways

  - [HeyGen plans to host two thought leadership webinars per month, focusing on marketing and L\&D personas](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Content repurposing workflow is being developed to turn webinars into multiple blog posts and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [20 new product templates have been released, with 20 more coming soon, to be leveraged in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO efforts aim to produce 7,200 articles in the next year, starting with 200 per month](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Localization efforts are being explored, including Spanish content creation and translation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Strategy and Content Repurposing

  - [Two thought leadership webinars planned per month, alternating between marketing and L\&D personas](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Anna has a monthly slot for dedicated sales lead growth webinars](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Content repurposing workflow being developed by Daniel to turn webinars into multiple blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Possibility of creating case studies from webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Webinars will be available on-demand and on YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Blog Content and Approval Process

  - [Numerous articles pending approval in the content OS, including use case topics](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [10 pending topics for potential eBook repurposing for L\&D and marketing audiences](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Mariana to develop L\&D ideas this week upon approval](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Discussion on creating programmatic images for blog posts, awaiting Lead's decision](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Product Templates and Use Cases

  - [20 new product templates released, with 20 more to be published soon](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Templates cover various industries: technology, digital marketing agencies, e-learning, IT](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage templates in content strategy and user journey](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Goal: Produce 7,200 articles in the next year, starting with 200 per month](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Focus on high-volume keywords and potential "blue ocean" zero-volume keywords](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Plan to track cluster-level metrics and scale based on CTR performance](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Content gap analysis to be conducted to identify new content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Video Content and Repurposing

  - [New video repurposing feature shifting to production next week](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Opportunity to convert written content into video format for YouTube distribution](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Credits to be provided for testing the new feature](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Localization Efforts

  - [Recent Spanish language webinar conducted](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Workflows for Spanish and English content creation available](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Opportunity to test localization efforts, including translating high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Potential for targeting lower keyword difficulty in Spanish market](https://fathom.video/share/f1PAV4eZiGTv9tM2yaYXsXdnnhXiDcTq?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

## Next Steps

  - Review and approve pending blog articles in the content OS
  - Develop L\&D ideas for potential eBook repurposing
  - Await Lead's decision on programmatic images for blog posts
  - Share workflows used by GrowthX team with HeyGen for remixing and customization
  - Approve programmatic SEO topics to begin content creation
  - Explore localization opportunities, starting with Spanish content
  - Test new video repurposing feature when credits are provided

action_items.description: Review & approve content in content OS
Develop L&D ideas for pending approval topics
Consult Lee re programmatic image styles
Follow up on potential product bug w/ templates
Ask Daniel to share API info w/ HeyGen team
Provide credits for testing video repurpose feature
Send content gap analysis to Jimmy's team for vetting
Approve programmatic topics for Jimmy's team to start work
